name: glob
label: glob
description: Find files using ripgrep file discovery: rg --files -g '<pattern>' <path(s)...>.
promptGuidelines: Use glob for fast file discovery.

patterns.description: Glob pattern(s) used to match files. Provide one or more patterns; each pattern is passed as `-g <pattern>`; use `!` for exclusions.

paths.description: Path(s) to search in. Provide one or more directories. If omitted, the current working directory is used.

limit.description: Maximum number of files to return. If omitted, the default limit is {{defaultLimit}}.

noIgnore.description: Include files ignored by .gitignore, .ignore, or other ripgrep ignore rules. If true, passes `--no-ignore`. If omitted, defaults to false.

hidden.description: Include hidden files. If true, passes `--hidden`. If omitted, defaults to false. Avoid using this argument unless intentionally searching hidden files; when using it, pair it with a targeted pattern, or path.
